## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (or equivalent `fmt` / `clippy` / `cargo test`)
- [ ] Integration tests updated/run if storage, queue, or writer behavior changed
- [ ] Docs / roadmap updated when user-facing behavior or backlog status changes
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or private keys included
